mapper.insert:
insert into course_selection
student_id, course_id, semester_id, status
values
#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{semesterId}, '已选'
mapper.select: select cs.id, cs.course_id, cs.student_id as studentId, stu.name as student_name, c.course_name, c.credit, s.name as semester_name, cs.status, cs.score, cs.score_point from course_selection cs left join course c on cs.course_id = c.id left join student stu on cs.student_id = stu.id left join semester s on cs.semester_id = s.id where cs.id = #{courseSelectionId}
